input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that invoke full Maven builds can accidentally depend on the host ~/.m2/settings.xml, local repository contents, or network access; generated coverage should prefer hermetic API/CLI paths such as --help/--version or create temporary settings/local repository inside test code if needed.
Existing 2.0.6 tests instantiate maven-artifact exceptions with signatures that changed by 2.0.7, so generated fixes must adapt source code to the 2.0.7 API rather than add dependencies.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core 2.0.7 is a self-contained Maven 2.x core artifact whose POM declares the Maven, Plexus, ClassWorlds, Wagon, and CLI dependencies needed by normal tests; the reported failure is caused by API constructor changes between 2.0.6 and 2.0.7, not by missing setup.
